creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
Can you try to compile (you must pass -lkvm to cc) and run attached file?

Output must be something like:
$ mymeminfo
KVM opened successfully.

Total swap:  12582656 kB
Used swap:   569752 kB
% swap used: 4
Free swap:   12012904 kB
% swap free: 95

Total mem:    3960040 kB
Used mem:     3913564 kB
Free mem:     46476 kB
Active mem:   872176 kB
Inactive mem: 2331964 kB
Wired mem:    567200 kB
Cached mem:   141284 kB
Buffered mem: 420384 kB

KVM closed successfully


BTW, does top(1) give you correct memory values?
